action_set_definitions.name: get_shipment_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the details of an inbound shipment/purchase order, including its ETA and total item quantities.

action_set_definitions.name: get_sku_soft_allocations
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current number of soft-allocated (reserved but not yet shipped) units for a specific SKU.

sku_id.description: The unique identifier for the SKU.

action_set_definitions.name: list_pending_orders
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a list of all pending customer orders for a specific SKU that have not yet been fulfilled.

sku_id.description: The unique identifier for the SKU.

action_set_definitions.name: update_shopify_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the sellable backorder quantity (I-ATP) on the Shopify platform for a specific SKU.

action_set_definitions.name: update_order_regulatory_status
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the status of a specific order to reflect regulatory compliance needs (e.g., 'Consent Required').

state_description.inventory_records: A mapping of SKU IDs to their current physical stock levels and warehouse IDs.
state_description.platform_sync_status: Current synchronization status and timestamp for external sales channels like Amazon or Shopify.
state_description.pending_orders: A list of orders received but not yet deducted from physical inventory.
state_description.last_sync_timestamp: The ISO 8601 timestamp of the last successful global synchronization event.
